hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | head -1); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*rm\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|^\s*rm\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*r'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+push\s+.*--force|^\s*git\s+push\s+-f'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git push --force'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+reset\s+--hard'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git reset --hard'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*git\s+clean\s+.*-[a-zA-Z]*f'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git clean -f'; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^\s*(npm|pnpm)\s+publish'; then echo 'BLOCKED: npm/pnpm publish (CI only, see ADR-007)'; exit 2; fi
